name: 2026-05-19 Political Commentary TEST Infrastructure Promise FB
description:
Every campaign season, the same promise: traffic will be solved. Roads will be widened. The MRT will run on time.

Every post-campaign season, the same reality: the convoy moves faster than ever. The rest of the country waits.

Infrastructure projects exist when they serve the announcement. They evaporate when the cameras leave.

The public pays the bill. The convoy gets the lane.

Ganun kalala.
